tasks.name: Create activity_type enum in schema file
tasks.purpose: Define type-safe activity type values for the activity_logs table

constraints: Enum must include: lesson_completed, quiz_completed, assessment_completed, presentation_created, presentation_updated, task_completed, coaching_booked
Follow existing enum pattern in 01-enums.sql

tasks.input_state: Schema directory exists with numbered files; 01-enums.sql contains other enums
tasks.output_state: New schema file 18-activity-logs.sql exists with activity_type enum definition
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file exists and contains CREATE TYPE statement for activity_type enum with all required values
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'create type public.activity_type as enum' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'lesson_completed' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql

tasks.name: Create activity_logs table in schema file
tasks.purpose: Define the database table structure for storing user activity logs

constraints: Columns: id (bigint generated), user_id (uuid), activity_type (enum), entity_id (uuid), entity_name (text), metadata (jsonb), created_at (timestamptz)
Foreign key to auth.users(id) with cascade delete
Follow notification table pattern for structure
Include table and column comments

tasks.input_state: Schema file exists with activity_type enum; notifications table exists as reference pattern
tasks.output_state: activity_logs table definition added to schema file with all required columns and constraints
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Table definition exists with all required columns, foreign key constraint, and comments
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'create table if not exists public.activity_logs' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'user_id uuid' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'metadata jsonb' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql

tasks.name: Add indexes to activity_logs table in schema file
tasks.purpose: Optimize query performance for activity feed queries by user and time

constraints: Create index on (user_id)
Create index on (created_at DESC)
Create composite index on (user_id, created_at DESC)
Follow notifications index pattern

tasks.input_state: activity_logs table definition exists in schema file
tasks.output_state: Three indexes added to schema file for activity_logs table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file contains CREATE INDEX statements for user_id, created_at DESC, and composite (user_id, created_at DESC)

tasks.name: Add RLS policies to activity_logs table in schema file
tasks.purpose: Secure activity_logs table so users can only access their own activity records

constraints: Enable RLS on activity_logs table
Revoke all permissions from authenticated and service_role
Grant SELECT and INSERT to authenticated
CREATE policy for SELECT: user can read own activities (user_id = auth.uid())
CREATE policy for INSERT: user can create own activities (user_id = auth.uid())
Use performant RLS pattern with subquery: user_id = (select auth.uid())
No UPDATE or DELETE policies needed (append-only log)

tasks.input_state: activity_logs table definition exists in schema file
tasks.output_state: RLS enabled with SELECT and INSERT policies; permissions configured
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file contains ALTER TABLE enable RLS, REVOKE, GRANT, and two CREATE POLICY statements with subquery pattern
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'alter table public.activity_logs enable row level security' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'create policy.*activity_logs.*select' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'create policy.*activity_logs.*insert' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql

tasks.name: Create get_recent_activities RPC function in schema file
tasks.purpose: Provide efficient server-side aggregation function for querying user activity logs

constraints: Function signature: get_recent_activities(target_user_id uuid, activity_limit int)
Use LANGUAGE plpgsql
Use SECURITY INVOKER (inherits RLS)
Set search_path = '' for security
Return SETOF activity_logs
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT by activity_limit parameter
Grant EXECUTE to authenticated

tasks.input_state: activity_logs table with indexes and RLS policies exists in schema file
tasks.output_state: RPC function added to schema file for querying recent activities
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file contains CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_recent_activities with security invoker and proper parameters
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'create or replace function public.get_recent_activities' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'security invoker' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql && grep -q 'grant execute on function public.get_recent_activities' /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes/apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-activity-logs.sql

tasks.name: Generate migration from schema file
tasks.purpose: Create migration file that will apply the schema changes to the database

constraints: Run: pnpm --filter web supabase migrations new activity_logs
Copy content from 18-activity-logs.sql to new migration file
Migration file should be in apps/web/supabase/migrations/

tasks.input_state: Complete schema file 18-activity-logs.sql exists with enum, table, indexes, RLS, and RPC function
tasks.output_state: New migration file created in migrations directory with timestamp prefix
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Migration file exists in migrations directory and contains all schema definitions from 18-activity-logs.sql

tasks.name: Apply migration to database
tasks.purpose: Apply the migration to create activity_logs table and RPC function in the database

constraints: Run: pnpm --filter web supabase migration up
Verify migration applied successfully
No code changes, just command execution

tasks.input_state: Migration file exists but not applied to database
tasks.output_state: Migration applied; activity_logs table and get_recent_activities function exist in database
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Migration command succeeds and table exists in database
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web supabase db exec --file - <<< "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.activity_logs;" 2>&1 | grep -qv 'does not exist'

Export LogActivitySchema (user_id, activity_type, entity_id, entity_name, metadata optional)

tasks.name: Create logActivity helper function file

Insert into activity_logs table

tasks.name: Add activity logging to lesson completion server action

action.target: logActivity call to course server action

tasks.purpose: Track lesson completions in activity_logs when users complete lessons

constraints: Import logActivity from activity-logger.ts
Find lesson completion action (likely completeLesson or similar)
Add logActivity call after successful lesson completion
Pass activity_type: 'lesson_completed', user_id, entity_id (lesson id), entity_name (lesson name)
Don't block on logging failure (fire-and-forget pattern)
Add comment explaining the logging

tasks.input_state: course server-actions.ts exists with lesson completion action; logActivity helper exists
tasks.output_state: Lesson completion action updated to log activity after successful completion
